signal_watch.title: 3 Years of Graph Engineering with LangGraph
signal_watch.author: LangChain
signal_watch.summary: Graph engineering isn't a new idea. It's the latest name for a well established approach to building reliable agents. It's the same idea behind loop engineering and harness engineering: building putting model reasoning in the right places, with the right context, at each step. At LangChain, we've been helping people build agents with graphs for 3 years! Here's what we've learned.

At LangChain, we've been helping people build agents with graphs for 3 years! Here's what we've learned.

signal_watch.title: Extend eve agents with installable extensions
signal_watch.author: Vercel AI
signal_watch.summary: You can now package tools, connections, skills, instructions, and hooks into extensions that any eve agent can import. Extensions can be published to package registries like npm, then installed, versioned, and upgraded like any other project dependency. A browser-use extension might ship tools for navigating a site, a memory extension can capture context with hooks and recall it with tools, and a self-improvement extension pairs hooks with dynamic instructions. signal_watch.title: AI Gateway now supports streaming transcription
signal_watch.author: Vercel AI
signal_watch.summary: AI Gateway now supports streaming transcription . Previously, transcription required a complete audio file and returned the full transcript in a single response. Now you can stream audio in as it's captured and get transcript updates back as the model produces them, keeping latency low for uses like live captioning and voice input. Streaming transcription is in beta and available through the AI SDK 's streamTranscribe function with any streaming-capable transcription model. T
signal_watch.excerpt: AI Gateway now supports streaming transcription . Previously, transcription required a complete audio file and returned the full transcript in a single response. Now you can stream audio in as it's captured and get transcript updates back as the model produces them, keeping latency low for uses like live captioning and voice input. Streaming transcription is in beta and available through the AI SDK 's streamTranscribe function with any streaming-capable transcription model. T
signal_watch.reason_selected: 当日新抓取且未展示过：AI Gateway now supports streaming transcription 来自 Vercel AI 的公开抓取入口，证据链保留原始链接与抓取来源。

signal_watch.author: Vercel AI
signal_watch.summary: Vercel Connect now includes preset connectors for 90+ services, including Shopify, Resend, Sanity, Okta, Workday, and Jira. signal_watch.title: Service tiers now available on AI Gateway
signal_watch.author: Vercel AI
signal_watch.summary: AI Gateway now supports service tiering. Service tiers let you optimize for latency, throughput, and cost per request to match your use case. Pick a faster tier for interactive workloads (less queueing, higher token throughput), or a lower cost tier for background jobs that can tolerate more latency. At launch, service tiering is available for OpenAI and Gemini models. Service tiers work across every AI Gateway API format: AI SDK , Chat Completions API , Anthropic Messages AP
signal_watch.excerpt: AI Gateway now supports service tiering. Service tiers let you optimize for latency, throughput, and cost per request to match your use case. Pick a faster tier for interactive workloads (less queueing, higher token throughput), or a lower cost tier for background jobs that can tolerate more latency. At launch, service tiering is available for OpenAI and Gemini models. Service tiers work across every AI Gateway API format: AI SDK , Chat Completions API , Anthropic Messages AP

hot_rank.title: Service tiers now available on AI Gateway
hot_rank.author: Vercel AI
hot_rank.summary: AI Gateway now supports service tiering. Service tiers let you optimize for latency, throughput, and cost per request to match your use case. Pick a faster tier for interactive workloads (less queueing, higher token throughput), or a lower cost tier for background jobs that can tolerate more latency. At launch, service tiering is available for OpenAI and Gemini models. Service tiers work across every AI Gateway API format: AI SDK , Chat Completions API , Anthropic Messages AP

clusters.title: Next chapter: Restructuring GitHub’s bug bounty program

clusters.title: Copilot vs. raw API access: What are you actually paying for?
clusters.summary: Copilot now bills usage at listed API rates. Compare direct model access with the coding workflow, policy, and harness work around it. The post Copilot vs. raw API access: What are you actually paying for? appeared first on The GitHub Blog .

clusters.title: 3 Years of Graph Engineering with LangGraph
clusters.summary: Graph engineering isn't a new idea. It's the latest name for a well established approach to building reliable agents. It's the same idea behind loop engineering and harness engineering: building putting model reasoning in the right places, with the right context, at each step. At LangChain, we've been helping people build agents with graphs for 3 years! Here's what we've learned.

clusters.title: Make Long-Running NVIDIA TensorRT Engine Builds Observable and Cancelable in Python or C++
clusters.summary: NVIDIA Technical Blog · Make Long-Running NVIDIA TensorRT Engine Builds Observable and Cancelable in Python or C++

clusters.title: Extend eve agents with installable extensions
clusters.summary: You can now package tools, connections, skills, instructions, and hooks into extensions that any eve agent can import. Extensions can be published to package registries like npm, then installed, versioned, and upgraded like any other project dependency. A browser-use extension might ship tools for navigating a site, a memory extension can capture context with hooks and recall it with tools, and a self-improvement extension pairs hooks with dynamic instructions. Scaffold a new

clusters.title: Eval Engineering Skill: Build Evals From Repo Context and Traces
clusters.summary: LangChain's Eval Engineering Skill inspects your agent's repo and traces, proposes evals through user interviews, and outputs runnable Harbor tasks.

clusters.title: AI Gateway now supports streaming transcription
clusters.summary: AI Gateway now supports streaming transcription . Previously, transcription required a complete audio file and returned the full transcript in a single response. Now you can stream audio in as it's captured and get transcript updates back as the model produces them, keeping latency low for uses like live captioning and voice input. Streaming transcription is in beta and available through the AI SDK 's streamTranscribe function with any streaming-capable transcription model. T
